questionHtml: Suggest, giving a reason, how elastomers used for the tyre tread can increase the traction between the tyre and the road.
markschemeHtml:
elastomers bend under force «and return to original form when force is released»
OR
elastomers make tyre more flexible  [✔]

allows greater contact with road  [✔]

meta.title: Suggest, giving a reason, how elastomers used for the tyre tread can increase the traction between the tyre and the road.
